The '''''Galliot''''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|CR92a ''Assassin''-class corvette]] operated by the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]].

Along with its sister ship, the ''[[Selander]]'', the ''Galliot'' attacked the [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] [[XQ1 Platform]] [[Science Station Youst]], during a battle in the [[Sepan Civil War]].

A warhead attack, carried out by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] in a [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]], in defense of the Dimok platform, drove off the Ripoblus reprisal. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]]'s flagship, the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']], was able to re-establish order around the station.

==Behind the scenes==
A [[Wikipedia:Galiot|galliot]] was a type of ship used on Earth during the [[Wikipedia:Age of Sail|Age of Sail]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
